releases.author: twentytwokhz
releases.description:
Implemented feature [#1](https://github.com/twentytwokhz/language-translator/issues/1)

User can now translate text directly.
This is possible because there is a new setting for the plugin which specified the default language.
It is also a good place to check what languages are supported.

PS: Klingon is also supported

> bortaS nIvqu' 'oH bortaS'e'. :vulcan_salute:
